flags.concern: Over-engineering: the plan adds a new calc-based height system in both `LayoutMainContent` and `Layout`, even though this layout already has a centralized bottom-offset path.
flags.evidence: Revised from v1 to address all four gate flags. Dropped Step 3 (Layout.tsx changes) entirely — wrong layer since GenerationsPane is position:fixed. Simplified the fix from introducing calc-based height in two layers to a two-line change: (1) remove the paddingBottom override for video editor in LayoutMainContent, (2) change h-screen to h-full in VideoEditorPage. Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

flags.concern: Step 3 targets the wrong layer: shrinking `Layout.tsx`'s outer wrapper is not what controls overlap with the generations pane.

Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

flags.concern: The plan's suggestion to fall back to `generationsPaneHeight` as a simpler approximation is incorrect and can reintroduce overlap on constrained viewports.

flags.concern: The validation section only reruns existing tests, but the current suite does not cover the video-editor shell branch that the fix depends on.

flags.concern: Step 3 only fixes the loaded editor shell and still leaves the route's loading/error wrappers full-screen.
flags.evidence: `VideoEditorPage` still has `h-screen` wrappers in the error and loading branches at `src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx:263` and `src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx:275`. The plan only changes the main shell at `src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx:292`, so the same overlap can still occur while a timeline is loading or when the route errors.

flags.concern: Step 5 points Vitest at a non-existent `useBottomOffset` test path.
flags.evidence: The repository has `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts`, but the plan says to run `src/shared/hooks/layout/useBottomOffset.test.ts`. Under `src/shared/hooks/layout/`, the repo only contains the implementation file `useBottomOffset.ts`, not a matching test file.
